Newegg is also matching the price for this PC directly at its store, while the Amazon listing currently has it for $1,600. items.title: Apple is using AI to fix Safari’s extension problem
items.summary: Apple is trying to solve one of Safari's biggest weaknesses with AI. Safari has long lacked the robust library of extensions that its rivals have, mainly due to the stringent development requirements from Apple. But now, Apple is inviting users to essentially vibe-code their own extensions. In a demo shared by Apple, the company showed […]

items.title: Where was tvOS 27 at WWDC?
items.summary: Every year, Apple's Worldwide Developers Conference gives us a first look at what's coming next to the company's many operating systems. But missing from today's keynote, apart from a single graphic listing all current Apple OSes next to a big "27," was any mention of tvOS. The whole structure of this year's WWDC was different, […]

items.title: Apple’s new parental controls are for keeping Apple out of trouble

items.title: Jackery Early Prime Day Sale offers up to 65% power station discounts + up to 10% bonus savings – all starting from $499
items.summary:
Jackery has officially launched its Early Prime Day Sale with up to 65% discounts on power stations, three tiers of automatically applied extra savings in your cart (5%, 7%, 10%), and a chance to win your order for FREE with a simple email subscription. If you want to really take advantage of the biggest savings to score a home backup companion, you’ll get a new low price going with Jackery’s 5,040Wh Explorer 5000 Plus Portable Power Station with two 500W solar panels and a Smart Transfer Switch for $4,499.10 shipped (or check out the bigger bundles below), beating Amazon’s pricing by $800. While it may carry a $6,499 MSRP direct from Jackery, we only ever saw it climb to that rate earlier in 2026, with things usually starting around $5,889 recently, and discounts only going as low as $4,549 back during Black Friday. Now, during this sale, you’ll be getting a larger-than-ever $2,000 markdown with the bonus savings factored in, giving you an all-new all-time low price. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals.

items.title: Jackery Early Prime Day flash sale drops 7,168Wh expanded HomePower 3600 Plus station + 500W solar panel to $3,134, more
items.summary:
Jackery has launched its Early Prime Day Sale event that will be running through Father’s Day, and also kicked things off with an additional flash sale running for the next three days on three units – plus, you benefit from Jackery’s three tiers of bonus savings codes automatically applied in your cart. One of these is the HomePower 3600 Plus Portable Power Station with an extra battery and 500W solar panel for $3,134.05 shipped, which is currently unavailable over at Amazon. This bundle carries a $5,899 MSRP direct from Jackery, and while we have seen the occasional spikes to that rate at Amazon, deals there tend to only climb as high as $4,579 lately, with discounts having gone as low as $3,099, which was last seen in March. Now, you’re getting a combined $2,765 savings with the bonus 5% discount, giving you the second-lowest price we have tracked overall. Head below to learn more, as well as browse the other two included bundles in this flash sale.

This is one of the newer Hall effect models that hit the scene earlier this carrying a $220 price tag. It has only been discounted a couple of times since its debut and it has never dropped below the $180 mark. Today’s 27% discount takes $60 off its usual going rate to land it $27 below its previous all-time low. This is the lowest price we have tracked for this keyboard, so be sure to grab it after getting more details below.
